case_title: CHRISTOPHER FLEMING VS. ANTHONY BELL SR et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, ADVANCED FROM JUN-17-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-03-2002 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER EX-PARTE ORDER FILED ON MAY 23, 2002

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF THE DEMURRING PARTY. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IS HEARING REQUIRED.
